figures.caption: Figure 1: Plot of the upper and lower bounds on the probability that arm 𝑖 is the best in expectation for different arms and instantiations of the Plackett-Luce model.

Figure 3: Lower bound for the probability that a specific arm wins in expectation at most 𝑡 times over all other arms at after up to 10 duels for different instantiations of the underlying Plackett-Luce Model.
Figure 2: Lower bound for the probability that arm 1 is in expectation the winner over arm 2 after up to 10 duels for different instantiations of the underlying Plackett-Luce Model.

Figure 4: Lower bound for the probability that a specific arm wins in expectation at least 𝑡 times over all other arms at after up to 10 duels for different instantiations of the underlying Plackett-Luce Model.
